name: soc2 evidence collection: validator --summary reports a coverage percentage of controls-with-evidence over total soc2 controls
command:
mkdir -p compliance/evidence/CC1.1 && touch compliance/evidence/CC1.1/x.txt && printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC1.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending
- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [hook]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > compliance/controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-evidence-folder.sh" --evidence-dir "$PWD/compliance/evidence" --controls-file "$PWD/compliance/controls.yaml" --summary 2>summary.log; grep -E 'coverage:\s*50' summary.log 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
